expectations.text: Runs or instructs `claude plugin marketplace update ram-companies` before attempting the update
expectations.evidence: Step 1 gives this exact command first.

expectations.text: Asks whether to update at `user` or `project` scope before running the update
expectations.evidence: Mentions `--scope project` only as a passing aside ('if you installed it at the project level... add --scope project') without ever asking the user which scope they want.

expectations.text: Runs or instructs `claude plugin update ram@ram-companies` (with `--scope project` if resolved)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 gives the base command and the --scope project variant.

expectations.text: Suggests verifying the result with `claude plugin list`
expectations.evidence: No mention of `claude plugin list` or any other verification step anywhere in the response.
